title: Kyle
description: Kyle Chauvin is an Assistant Professor of Economics at NYU Shanghai. His research in microeconomic theory and behavioral economics investigates the consequences of imperfect learning for communication, persuasion, discrimination, and social networks.
text:
Kyle Chauvin
Kyle Chauvin is an Assistant Professor of Economics at NYU Shanghai. His research in microeconomic theory and behavioral economics investigates the consequences of imperfect learning for communication, persuasion, discrimination, and social networks.
